---
applyTo: "**/*"
---

# Asistente_IA repository guidance

This repository contains project-specific agent definitions that can be used by compatible IDEs and CLI tools.

When working on this repo:
- Prefer the agent that matches the task: architecture, planning, implementation, testing, UI/UX, or security.
- Keep changes scoped and documented.
- Validate behavior with the relevant tests or checks before finishing.
- Respect the existing project structure under src/, tests/, ui/, and training/.
